sections.paragraph:
m. (from the root שָׁאָה-

(1) noise, tumult, as of waters, Psa 65:8 of a great crowd of men, Isa 5:14 13:4 24:8 of war, Amo 2:2 Hos 10:14 of clamour, Psa 74:23 Jer 25:31. Jer 48:45, שָׁאֹון בְּנֵי “the sons of noise,” i.e. tumultuous soldiers.

(2) devastation, destruction. Psa 40:3, בֹּור שָׁאֹון “the pit of destruction;” Jer 46:17.

[“שָׁאַט an unused root, i.q. שׁוּט No. II, to loathe, Hence-”]
